name: acceptable-use
description: Defines appropriate and prohibited uses of the AI assistant for the organization: what to delegate, what requires human review, and guardrails around regulated advice, confidential data, automated decisions, and record-keeping. Use at the start of tasks that could carry legal, financial, HR, or compliance weight. Customize the placeholders before deploying.
version_note: Template plugin intended to be customized per-organization before rollout.
